title: [codereview-pass3-2] coap_status.c notify functions lack s_initialized check and error handling
description: New implementations of lichen_coap_status_notify and _neighbors_notify call coap_resource_notify unconditionally. Internal status_notify/neighbors_notify check !s_initialized. Should add similar guard. Also no LOG_DBG now (good per no-debug-prints rule). P2 robustness. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-2op3
close_reason: added s_initialized guards to notify functions, fixed error handling, no debug prints, tests pass, addressed in 3 codereview rounds
